user_system_path: Issue #226 (rung 6 owner-path readiness: sign-in + Slack self-loop) is the active seam. Issue #231 (work-state purity) is COMPLETE via PR #232. Rung 7 remains forbidden until #226 is proven.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #226 owner-path readiness. Auth/session/sign-in path (Gmail proven working, Microsoft broken — Azure OAuth/redirect/token persistence), Slack self-loop surfaces, governance amendments. Diagnosis-first: capture one failed Microsoft sign-in with exact evidence before patching.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard UI, no start/try/pricing pages, no acquisition agents, no Stripe, no schema migrations, no next.config changes, no new connectors, no non-owner proof.
required_browser_proof: Required — one successful Brandon sign-in via Microsoft on production or preview (screenshot/log evidence), plus one Slack self-loop end-to-end with one real next move surfaced.
acceptance_condition: Brandon signs in reliably via Gmail AND Microsoft; one Slack self-loop completes end-to-end surfacing one real next move; durable receipt posted to issue #226; gate:continuity/lint/build green.
stop_condition: Stop when #226 has a durable proof receipt (or a BLOCKED receipt naming the exact external blocker, e.g. Azure app config approval). Next seams after proof: rung 7 issue (non-owner paid loop) and the 'right now cards' product issue.
browser_proof_command: manual sign-in proof on production/preview + Slack self-loop receipt; Playwright auth specs where applicable
anti_regression_checks: issue #226 is the active owner-path-readiness seam
issue #231 is COMPLETE — work-state purity merged via PR #232
issue #220 is completed — rung 5 live proof passed
rung 7 non-owner paid loop is forbidden until issue #226 is proven
root markdown file count is bounded by gate:continuity (MAX 8)
a new governance rule may only be added by editing an existing keep-list file
trusted class requires outbound evidence — inbound volume alone yields unclassified
personal class is sticky and salience-capped
acquisition/growth agents are quarantined (default OFF) until owner re-enables
next_command: Work issue #226: diagnose Microsoft sign-in failure with exact evidence, fix narrowest seam, prove both providers, run one Slack self-loop, post receipts. Then open rung 7 + 'right now cards' issues.
